news.title: Wiki: Earning Gems
news.summary: Gems can be earned in the game by completing Achievements. When you complete challenges in the Achievements menu, for example, 'clear 50 obstacles', players are rewarded with Gems. When players gain 3,200 trophies, they will be awarded 2,000 Gems (3,715 if you count all the Gems awarded by trophies)
